---

# ttb-marker — Code Generation Marker

## Purpose

Inject a marker comment block at the top of every generated `.swift` file to track provenance and enable audit compliance.

## Marker Block

```swift
//
//  {FILE_NAME}
//  {PROJECT_NAME}
//
//  Generated by TTBaseUIKit Antigravity Agent System
//  DO NOT EDIT manually — changes will be overwritten
//
//  Version: {DATE}
//  Skill: {SKILL_NAME} v{VERSION}
//
//  Architecture: MVVM-C | Framework: TTBaseUIKit | Min iOS: 14
//
```

## Usage

```swift
//  DeviceDetailViewController.swift
//  TTBaseUIKitExample
//
//  Generated by TTBaseUIKit Antigravity Agent System
//  DO NOT EDIT manually — changes will be overwritten
//
//  Version: 2026-05-19
//  Skill: ttb-skill-uikit v2.0.0
//
//  Architecture: MVVM-C | Framework: TTBaseUIKit | Min iOS: 14
//
```

## Requirements

Every generated file MUST have:
- File name
- Project name
- Generation metadata
- Architecture and framework info
- Version date

## Notes

- `DO NOT EDIT` warning prevents manual overrides of generated code
- Skill/version enables traceability
- Use this for ALL generated files (ViewController, ViewModel, Model, API, etc.)

---
